name: Zucchini and Carrot Appetizer
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tsp wine vinegar or lemon juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Install a medium slicer attachment on your food processor and feed the zucchini into the tube.
2. Remove the sliced zucchini and set aside.
3. In a work bowl, combine oil, wine vinegar or lemon juice, salt, pepper, and mixed herbs (if using).
4. Peel the carrots and feed them through the shredding disk of the food processor.
5. Toss the shredded carrots lightly with the dressing.
6. Mound the shredded carrots on top of thinly sliced zucchini.
7. Chill until serving.
